title: The Proof Gradient
subtitle: Where autonomous work earns the right to become capability.
kicker: GoalOS Public Proof Mission 001 · Ethereum Mainnet
manifesto: A model can answer. An agent can act. An institution must prove.
publicThesis: GoalOS turns autonomous work into a public chain of objective, experiment, evidence, falsification, replay, validation, settlement, memory, and controlled reuse.
objective: Run an open autonomous-research campaign against a frozen transformer-training benchmark and publish the complete institutional chain—not merely the winning result.
acceptance: At least 7% median reduction in time-to-target against the frozen baseline
No memory-budget violation and zero hidden correctness failures
Three fresh training seeds and two independent replay operators
Unanimous validator approval and a 72-hour public challenge window

proofChain.title: Commit the mission
proofChain.copy: Freeze the benchmark, budget, success metric, validators, claim boundary, and settlement rule before the first experiment.

proofChain.title: Publish the search
proofChain.copy: Record every hypothesis, patch, branch, environment, cost, and outcome—not only the winner.

proofChain.title: Preserve what failed
proofChain.copy: Compile errors, regressions, reward hacks, unstable branches, and negative lessons remain part of the public record.

proofChain.title: Rebuild independently
proofChain.copy: Separate operators reproduce the finalist from published source in fresh environments with unseen seeds.

proofChain.title: Validate under quorum
proofChain.copy: Correctness, performance, provenance, and claim boundaries receive independent signed decisions.

proofChain.title: Package what survived
proofChain.copy: Accepted work becomes a bounded capability with assumptions, evidence, fallback, and rollback conditions.

proofChain.title: Make proof consequential
proofChain.copy: Only accepted work may settle; validator, replay, falsification, and contributor rewards remain traceable.

proofChain.title: Convert proof into memory
proofChain.copy: The institution remembers accepted capability and failed branches without turning either into unbounded truth.

proofChain.title: Attempt the harder mission
proofChain.copy: Capability must prove transfer under tighter budget and abstain when its assumptions do not hold.

mission2.title: Capability Transfer Under Half the Search Budget
mission2.copy: Mission 002 asks whether accepted capability and failed-branch memory can improve a harder benchmark with 50% of the original search budget.
requirements: At least 30% fewer experiments than a no-memory control

proofRoute.purpose: Commit the mission objective before work begins
Bind experiments, branches, tools, and costs
Assemble provenance, claims, risks, and evidence
Preserve failed branches and rejected claims
Promote or reject under explicit gates
Route capability into a harder mission

claimBoundary: Public Proof Mission 001 is a published mission specification; no result is predeclared.
Any simulation or design stress test is synthetic and is not empirical scientific evidence.
The Mainnet evidence demonstrates deployed and source-verified infrastructure; it does not establish autonomous scientific performance, production safety, or external audit completion.
No website build, preview, validation, or installer workflow sends a blockchain transaction.
Only a completed campaign may support capability acceptance, AGIALPHA settlement, or on-chain promotion.
